title: Licania utilis
taxonomy: Licania utilis is a species of plant that belongs to the family Chrysobalanaceae. This family is part of the larger order Malpighiales, which is a part of the subclass Rosidae in the class Magnoliopsida. The class Magnoliopsida is a part of the division Magnoliophyta, also known as flowering plants. Licania utilis is a type of tree that is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Its classification is further detailed through its binomial nomenclature, which consists of its genus name Licania and species name utilis.
